description: Helen Hai discusses the significance of NFTs and blockchain technology in enabling the free transfer of values. She emphasizes the transformative potential of NFTs in the future economy and their role in redefining ownership and empowering individuals.
topic_summary: Helen Hai explains how blockchain and NFTs aim to facilitate the free transfer of values, drawing parallels with the internet's impact on information transfer. She highlights the endless possibilities of NFTs and their importance in empowering ownership and creativity [t=0:24 - t=1:32].
